tasks.label: validate-hardening-trackerbot
args: $env:GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN='placeholder'; pnpm eslint src/services/idb.ts src/persistence/appwrite-client.ts src/bot.ts --no-cache; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm type-check

tasks.label: validate-hardening-trackerbot-cmd
args: set GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN=placeholder&& pnpm eslint src/services/idb.ts src/persistence/appwrite-client.ts src/bot.ts --no-cache && pnpm type-check

tasks.label: validate-local-authoritative-trackerbot
args: set GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN=placeholder&& pnpm eslint src/services/idb.ts src/persistence/guilds-repo.ts src/persistence/users-repo.ts src/persistence/analytics-repo.ts src/persistence/index.ts --no-cache && pnpm type-check

tasks.label: validate-local-authoritative-trackerbot-rerun
args: set GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN=placeholder&& pnpm eslint src/services/idb.ts src/persistence/guilds-repo.ts src/persistence/users-repo.ts src/persistence/analytics-repo.ts src/persistence/index.ts --no-cache && pnpm type-check

tasks.label: trackerbot-zod-lint-env
args: set GITHUB_PACKAGES_TOKEN=placeholder&& pnpm eslint src/features/track/types.ts src/features/track/local-run-store.ts src/features/track/tracker-api-client.ts src/persistence/users-repo.ts --no-cache
